heroHeadline: Xi Jinping Secures Unprecedented Third Term as Taiwan Tensions Escalate and Economic Headwinds Mount
heroSubtitle: From the Xia Dynasty's legendary founding ~2070 BCE to Xi Jinping's 2024 Taiwan military exercises — 4,000 years of Chinese civilization, revolution, and global rise tracked in real time.
footerNote: Data sourced from official Chinese government reports (NBS, MFA, PLARF), major news outlets (Reuters, AP, BBC, Xinhua, SCMP), academic scholarship, and international institutional analyses (UN, IMF, World Bank, SIPRI, ASPI).
